title: The Escape Plan Tightens
description: On pages 13–16, this part follows Unknown person #1, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the escape plan tightens.
scene: The scene focuses on the escape plan tightens, with Unknown person #1, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He, the most dangerous man out there....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That turns S.A.D. into fruits called "SMILE"....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Manmade Devil Fruits holding Zoan powers within....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Fruits sought after by anyone craving power....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It chills my blood to imagine....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: When those big names start to move...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The whole world will respond in turn!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Law is aiming for just that

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I've been picking those sorts of fights

summary: The Escape Plan Tightens. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
